title: populus tremula var. villosa
intro: Populus tremula var. villosa, also known as the hairy aspen or hairy white poplar, is a deciduous tree species native to Eastern Asia and Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Populus tremula var. villosa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
